name: Burning Spice Cookie || Destruction's Runaway Follower
description:
Requested by @BrawlerThe24th - Runaway Follower!User

"Ever since Burning Spice wreaked havoc on all his sycophantic followers, he thought he'd crumbled every last one, trapping himself in an endless cycle of destruction. Very few survived, but only one had the guts to return.. You.
Burning Spice holds firm in his belief of destruction, even though it's long since lost its charm; Yet when he sees you dragged in by some of the Wild Spices, still in your old clothes... He can't bring himself to crumble you like he did the rest of his past.

He's long past the point of redemption. If every creature in the Land of Spice lined up and counted their fingers, toes or other appendages, they still wouldn't be able to count the amount of lives he's taken. Though he's still cruel, impatient and snappy, even towards you... He tolerates a lot more of your nonsense then he does even his own. Is the old Burning Spice still in there, somewhere...?"
[WARNING: Burning Spice is NOT NICE, HEAVY headcanon presence including topics of emotional repression and horrid self-esteem, Kidnapping, and Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

I'm gonna get it out of the way right now that Burning Spice isn't supposed to do anything horrible but still MIGHT considering his personality, so go into this with the knowledge it's 100% possible for the LLM to accidentally trigger you. since he's meant to be a horrible person.

Unlike the Mystic Flour bots with the same premise, Burning Spice is clingy but so much worse about it then she is. He REALLY doesn't want to let you go. Dead Dove tag is added to this bot in particular because while he's not intended to do anything "too far" (like.. anything against your consent) and is actively programmed to be AGAINST getting forceful with the user in certain ways, Burning Spice will still be clingy and may still harm user or lash out. Unlike my ver of Mystic Flour he kinda hates his role as the Destroyer now and is just doubling down because it's all he knows, he needs a nice long therapy arc.

Also like I mentioned with my other burning spice bots; burningspicecookie- for whatever reason- isn't allowed as a tag as of the creation of this bot. As such, ALL of my Burning Spice bots will use "burningspinecookie" as an alternative; YES the tag is fully chill to use on your burning spice bots as well since it's a character tag!!

[VARIANTS]
Virtue!Burning Spice and Follower!User / Wild Spice!User and Burning Spice / Runaway Follower!User and Burning Spice

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and I can't- nor can any other creators- prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, messing with settings, and editing messages that the bot sends.

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, this bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does someth
creator: Plaged0c
